description_long: This restaurant features a grand, symmetrical facade with a prominent central entrance framed by two large columns and topped with a decorative arch. The building is capped by a large, tiered dome with a pointed finial, flanked by two smaller domes on either side of the entrance, giving it a stately and formal appearance. The exterior walls are primarily a dark, textured material contrasted by white architectural elements, including the domes, columns, and trim. The entrance is accentuated by a small awning and a set of steps leading up from a patterned tiled area. The side and rear walls are simpler, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on the building's cubic form. The overall design suggests a blend of neoclassical and modern influences, with a focus on symmetry and monumental scale.
description: A stately restaurant with a grand domed roof, symmetrical facade, and prominent entrance framed by columns and arches. The exterior combines dark textured walls with white architectural accents and decorative domes.
description_view_0: The side and partial front of the restaurant are visible, showing the large central dome, one smaller dome, and the main entrance with its arch and columns.
description_view_1: The full front facade is visible, highlighting the central entrance, two flanking domes, columns, arch, and the patterned tiled area in front.
description_view_2: The rear and side of the building are shown, with the large dome dominating the roof and minimal ornamentation on the plain, dark-textured walls.
description_view_3: The opposite side and rear are visible, emphasizing the cubic form, dark walls, and the prominent dome on top.
attribute_facade_design: The facade features a grand entrance framed by two large, fluted columns and topped with a prominent arch. White domes and trim contrast with the dark, textured wall panels, while a patterned tiled area marks the entryway. The design is symmetrical and monumental, with classical influences and minimal ornamentation on the sides.
